scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck
scripts.sync:links: rm -rf node_modules/effect node_modules/fast-check && ln -s ../opencode-latest/node_modules/.bun/effect@4.0.0-beta.83/node_modules/effect node_modules/effect && ln -s ../opencode-latest/node_modules/.bun/fast-check@4.8.0/node_modules/fast-check node_modules/fast-check
scripts.update:opencode: git -C opencode-latest pull --ff-only && bun --cwd opencode-latest install
